allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/sinpoussi-cyber/agent5-football-pronostics/actions/runs?status=failure&per_page=1" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="claude-code"; "Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"} -ErrorAction Stop; $run = $response.workflow_runs[0]; "ID: $\($run.id\) | Name: $\($run.name\) | Date: $\($run.created_at\) | Branch: $\($run.head_branch\) | Conclusion: $\($run.conclusion\)")
PowerShell($token = $env:GITHUB_TOKEN; if \($token\) { "Token found" } else { "No GITHUB_TOKEN in env" })
